concept: granular; mythology; noir detective; power plant
answer:
Shadows, mist, whispers, crimson, enigmatic, haunting.  
The crumbling mansion stands alone, shrouded in secrets, where the whispers of the past linger in the shadows. The crimson moon hangs low, casting an eerie glow on the secrets buried beneath. An enigmatic figure lurks amidst the mist, a phantom of forgotten times.
